creator: seanc@FreeBSD.org
text:
CDB_File is a perl front end to the CDB database format.  This database
	format provides extremely quick readaccess to constant data.  The CDB
	file format is commonly used in djbdns and qmail.

	0.86 is the most recent version of the port available, however, it
	isn't available on CPAN or its mirrors.  At the same time, if you
	goto http://search.cpan.org, you can download it from there.  The
	latest version of the module that is in CPAN is 0.83, however it fails
	to compile.

	To download 0.86, you can goto:

	http://www.cpan.org/authors/id/TIMPX/CDB_File-0.86.tar.gz

	CPAN module author has been contacted about this and a resolution is
	expected.

How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
